task: Verify datasets/unknot/ has CSV exports for dims 7,8,9,10,11,12 at the L4 full-scale (not just the committed samples) so the queued exp_queue/20260628T040820Z_unknot_highdim_7to12.sh won't error on a missing dim_*.csv; note any missing dim in RESEARCH_LOG.
Note in RESEARCH_LOG that the dims 7-12 high-dim unknot retrain (excludes dim-6 mass) is queued to test whether the +0.096->+0.161 lift is real cross-dim signal vs a dim-6 artifact.
Add a visible dim-range label/column to the Results panel for each run, so the dim-6-excluded run is comparable at a glance against the dims 3-7 and dims 5-12 runs.

Readiness check for the hard-invariant pivot: report on the dashboard whether the DB's pd_code column is populated and how many DISTINCT pd_codes/knot-types exist per dimension (focus dims 7-10 where knotted pools are densest) — this gates the proposed knot-type and Alexander/Jones experiments.
